title: The War at Marineford Begins: Rising Conflict
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Spandam, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Franky, Unknown person #4 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Whitebeard, Spandam, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of the war at marineford begins: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The necessary preparations have been made.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Get away from me!! All of you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: kids who have never known peace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: and kids who have never known war...

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: right now, we stand in neutral territory!!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Justice will prevail? Well, sure it will!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: It's the ice witch, whitey bey !!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: This ice is nothing to me!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Notify all ships and all men!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: You've got something up your sleeves, eh...!?
